steps.title: Define the concept
steps.content: The student wants to present historical analysis to an audience unfamiliar with it. The best sentence should define historical analysis as an approach to art criticism and explain that it considers the context in which a work was created.

steps.title: Reject incomplete options
steps.content:
• Choice A explains texture analysis, not historical analysis.
  • Choice B contrasts the two approaches but focuses on texture analysis.
  • Choice D gives an example involving Las Meninas without explaining the concept.
The remaining choice directly presents the concept and its method. The answer is C.
